code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
let n = parts.len()
mut out = ""
mut i = 0
mut current_max = 0
while i < n
  let tok = match parts.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if i == 0
    current_max = v
  else if v > current_max
    current_max = v
  end
  if i == 0
    out = "#{current_max}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{current_max}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(out)
